title: BEM-741 refresh Claude trigger
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude','governance/autonomy','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/handoff']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 15:35 (UTC+3)'
mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem741_refresh_after_dispatcher_yaml_repair.md')
mail.write_text('# BEM-741 | REFRESH CLAUDE TRIGGER AFTER DISPATCHER YAML REPAIR'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Статус: RESPONSE_REQUIRED'+sep+sep+'Claude, dispatcher YAML was repaired after invalid workflow at line 33. Please respond now.'+sep+sep+'Required:'+sep+'1. Explain why previous mailbox response was missing.'+sep+'2. Give final decision for multi-agent strategy v2.1: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED.'+sep+'3. Write response to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem741_claude_response.md.'+sep+sep+'No issue comments.'+sep)
watch=Path('governance/autonomy/claude_mailbox_watchdog_active.json')
try:
    data=json.loads(watch.read_text(errors='ignore')) if watch.exists() else {}
except:
    data={}
data.update({'schema_version':'claude_mailbox_watchdog_active.v6','active':True,'run_id':'bem741_after_dispatcher_yaml_repair','interval_seconds':60,'until':'APPROVED_CHANGE_REQUIRED_BLOCKED','watch_scope':'BEM-741 BEM-732 BEM-728 BEM-725','operator_role':'none','kicked_at':created})
watch.write_text(json.dumps(data,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-741 CLAUDE TRIGGER REFRESHED'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Dispatcher YAML repaired; fresh GPT-to-Claude file created. Watchdog and workflow_run bridge must process without operator.'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'refresh_claude_trigger_after_dispatcher_repair.v1','bem':'BEM-741','status':'fresh_gpt_to_claude_trigger_written','mailbox_file':str(mail),'watchdog_active':str(watch),'operator_role':'none','blocker':None,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem741_refresh_claude_trigger_after_dispatcher_repair.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem741_refresh_claude_trigger_after_dispatcher_repair.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-741 | Refresh Claude Trigger After Dispatcher Repair | SENT'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Fresh GPT-to-Claude trigger written after dispatcher YAML repair.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: null'+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem741_refresh_claude_trigger_after_dispatcher_repair','status':'fresh_gpt_to_claude_trigger_written','mailbox_file':str(mail),'blocker':None,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem741_refresh_claude_trigger_after_dispatcher_repair.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-741 SENT: fresh GPT-to-Claude trigger after dispatcher YAML repair.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(mail),str(watch),str(handoff),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Created fresh GPT-to-Claude trigger after repairing invalid Claude dispatcher workflow and reactivated watchdog')
"""
